title: Product & Marketing Manager (m/w/d) Video On Demand
summary: Strong alignment on core product marketing competencies — GTM strategy, competitive analysis, budget tracking, and B2B marketing — with 4+ years of experience exceeding the required threshold. Key gaps are the lack of direct VoD/streaming or media licensing experience, no physical media (DVD/Blu-ray) background, and German proficiency at B1+ which may be below expectations for a content-heavy German-market role.
bonus_skills: Erfahrung in Lizenzierung, VoD oder physischen Medien
matched_skills: Master of Management & Entrepreneurship (meets BWL/Marketing degree requirement)
4+ years product marketing experience (exceeds 2-3 year requirement)
KPI dashboards, ROI reporting, Power BI (meets analytical strength requirement)
German B1+ (partial meet of German requirement)
Budget tracking and C-suite reporting via HSBC (matches Budgetplanung/Umsatzanalysen)
B2B GTM strategy and sales collateral (matches B2B marketing/PR tasks)
Moli Media Corporation experience (partial match for Entertainment/Media)
missing_skills: VoD platform or streaming channel product management experience
Media licensing or rights management knowledge
Trailer production or creative asset layout/production skills
Strong German proficiency (B2/C1) for a German-language media market role
core_responsibilities: Product management for film/series releases under own label, including VoD and physical media
Budget planning, revenue forecasting, and sales analysis
B2B and B2C marketing, PR, and promotional campaign development
Cross-functional communication with internal departments and external partners
recommended_emphasis: Highlight product lifecycle management across 4+ B2B product launches with revenue impact (4.6M CNY contracts)
Emphasize competitive analysis and market segmentation work to mirror Wettbewerbsanalyse requirement
Showcase budget tracking and financial reporting experience from HSBC (USD 8M programme) as proxy for Umsatzanalysen
Reference Moli Media Corporation digital/e-commerce experience to demonstrate media/entertainment affinity
Demonstrate cross-functional coordination and external partner communication from GTM execution roles
risk_flags: No direct VoD, SVoD, or streaming platform experience — core product domain of this role
German B1+ may be insufficient for a role requiring substantial German-language documentation, client communication, and market work
No physical media or DVD/Blu-ray industry background — niche requirement specific to this role
B2C marketing depth is limited; candidate's background is predominantly B2B
